overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a Batman video game showing the character traversing a stormy waterfront promenade at night. The character transitions from a slow walk to a run along the rain-slicked cobblestone path overlooking a dark city skyline across the water.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the waterfront railing, observing the stormy city skyline across the water

entered.detail: black metal railing running along the water's edge
large steel truss bridge structure silhouetted against the stormy sky
illuminated modern skyscrapers across the water with scattered lights
dark water surface between the promenade and the city

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night with the character walking slowly along a rain-slicked waterfront promenade. A metal railing lines the left side overlooking dark water, with a distant illuminated city skyline and a prominent truss bridge visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront path with street lighting

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the promenade

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the curved waterfront path with cape flowing behind

entered.detail: periodic lampposts lining the path casting warm light
low stone retaining wall along the right side of the path
leafless trees visible behind the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a sprint, moving faster along the curved promenade. The truss bridge disappears from view as the path bends, revealing street lamps and a stone wall lining the right side. The city skyline shifts to the left of the frame as the camera follows the character's rapid movement through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked waterfront promenade that shifts from a slow, atmospheric walk into a rapid sprint. It begins with the character moving steadily beside a metal railing, overlooking dark water and a distant illuminated city skyline anchored by a prominent truss bridge. As the character breaks into a sprint, the camera accelerates along the curved path, causing the bridge to disappear from view as the promenade bends. The scene then shifts to reveal street lamps and a stone wall lining the right side, while the city skyline slides toward the left of the frame. The movement finally culminates in a fast-paced glide through the falling rain, following the character's momentum along the glistening cobblestones.
